# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary

Describe the change and the Phase 4A step it supports.

## Phase 4A Guardrails

- [ ] This PR does not copy Frappe core
- [ ] This PR does not copy `frappe/`
- [ ] This PR does not copy `apps/frappe/`
- [ ] This PR does not commit secrets
- [ ] This PR does not commit local `.env` files
- [ ] This PR does not commit generated runtime output
- [ ] This PR keeps frontend, backend, contracts, infra, docs, and tests separated

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Structure only
- [ ] Frontend migration
- [ ] Contract/spec migration
- [ ] Backend app import
- [ ] Infra/deployment
- [ ] CI/validation

## Validation

List commands run or checks performed.

```text
Add validation notes here.
```
